stemHtml: You forget to de-ice the aircraft in icing conditions. Which of the following might occur?

options.a: The CLMAX reduces due to contamination on the wing.
options.b: The stall speed will be lower than normal due to an increase in drag.
options.c: The stall speed will be higher than normal due to a decrease in drag.
options.d: The CLMAX will increase due to contamination on the wing.
